svg.title: WhatsApp protocol stack and connection lifecycle
svg.desc: Shows the layered protocol stack WhatsApp uses over TCP, and the sequence of events from connection establishment to message delivery and ACK
svg.text: XML replaced with binary tokens — ~3× smaller frames

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does WhatsApp authenticate a device when it connects?')
sendPrompt('What does WhatsApp send when a device first connects to the server?')
sendPrompt('How does WhatsApp flush queued messages when you come back online?')
g.text: all held messages pushed in order

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the stanza ACK in WhatsApp messaging?')
sendPrompt('How does WhatsApp keep connections alive with keepalives?')

svg.text: TCP torn down, full handshake again
